name: Remofirst Global EOR API
what_it_does: Cost-competitive global Employer of Record (EOR) platform for hiring full-time employees and contractors in 180+ countries — offering one of the lowest EOR prices in the market with HRIS integration API for onboarding, payroll, and compliance.
use_cases: Onboarding international full-time employees via EOR API without local entity setup
Managing global contractor payments across multiple countries via single platform
Syncing employee data with HRIS systems via REST API integration
Querying employment costs and payroll data for financial forecasting
Automating employee offboarding workflows across multiple countries
not_for: Large enterprises needing white-glove EOR service with dedicated account management
Companies requiring complex local entity integration beyond standard EOR
Teams wanting fully self-serve API without sales engagement
best_when: A startup or scale-up wants to hire globally at lower EOR costs with basic HRIS API integration, prioritizing price over premium support.
avoid_when: You need premium EOR support, complex benefits customization, or the most established compliance infrastructure (prefer Deel or Remote for those).

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials for M2M integration. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. API access via partner program or enterprise plan. No fine-grained scopes currently.

pricing.notes: One of lowest-priced EOR platforms. Per-employee monthly pricing. Contractor management included. US-based company. Backed by Citi Ventures. 180+ countries. Focused on cost-competitive global hiring. API via partnership program.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for employee management, contracts, and payroll. OAuth2 for HRIS integration. Webhook support for employment lifecycle events. API documentation less mature than Deel or Remote. Employee onboarding involves legal review — not fully automatable.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Employee record reads idempotent. Onboarding operations sequential. Status queries idempotent. Payroll runs not idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: API access requires partnership or enterprise contract — not self-serve
Employee onboarding requires legal review — partial automation only
Country-specific employment law affects required data fields
Documentation less mature than established EOR competitors

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant. OAuth2 for integrations. US data residency. Employee PII handled with enterprise security. Younger platform — security posture improving as platform matures.
